queries.name: Busiest origin airports — 2023
queries.sql:
SELECT
    a.DisplayAirportName AS airport,
    count() AS flights
FROM ontime.fact_ontime AS f
INNER JOIN ontime.dim_airports AS a
    ON a.AirportCode = f.OriginCode AND a.IsLatest = 1
WHERE f.Year = 2023
GROUP BY airport
ORDER BY flights DESC
LIMIT 15
queries.description: Top 15 departure airports by flight count (joined to dim_airports for readable names). Horizontal Bar — hover any bar, long or short, to read its exact value.

queries.name: Flights by month — 2023
queries.sql:
SELECT Month AS month, count() AS flights
FROM ontime.fact_ontime
WHERE Year = 2023
GROUP BY month
ORDER BY month
queries.description: Monthly US flight volume. A numeric column named "month" is detected as an ordinal axis → vertical Column chart, with K/M-humanised value ticks.

queries.name: Daily flights — 2023
queries.sql:
SELECT FlightDate AS date, count() AS flights
FROM ontime.fact_ontime
WHERE Year = 2023
GROUP BY date
ORDER BY date
queries.description: One point per day across 2023 (~365 rows). A Date X axis is auto-detected as a time series → Line chart.

queries.name: Daily on-time rate — 2023
queries.sql:
SELECT
    FlightDate AS date,
    round(100 * countIf(ArrDel15 = 0) / count(), 1) AS on_time_pct
FROM ontime.fact_ontime
WHERE Year = 2023
GROUP BY date
ORDER BY date
queries.description: Share of flights arriving on time (< 15 min late) per day, as a percentage. Rendered as a filled Area chart.

queries.name: Cancellation reasons — 2023
queries.sql:
SELECT
    multiIf(CancellationCode = 'A', 'Carrier',
            CancellationCode = 'B', 'Weather',
            CancellationCode = 'C', 'National Air System',
            CancellationCode = 'D', 'Security', 'Other') AS reason,
    count() AS cancellations
FROM ontime.fact_ontime
WHERE Year = 2023 AND Cancelled = 1
GROUP BY reason
ORDER BY cancellations DESC
queries.description: Why flights were cancelled in 2023 (carrier / weather / national air system / security). A small categorical breakdown → Pie chart with a legend.

queries.name: Monthly flights by carrier — 2023
queries.sql:
SELECT
    Month AS month,
    Carrier AS carrier,
    count() AS flights
FROM ontime.fact_ontime
WHERE Year = 2023 AND Carrier IN ('WN', 'AA', 'DL', 'UA')
GROUP BY month, carrier
ORDER BY month, carrier
queries.description: Flights per month split across four major carriers (WN, AA, DL, UA). The "carrier" column is used as the Series, producing grouped bars with a per-carrier legend.

queries.name: Average delay breakdown by carrier — 2023
queries.sql:
SELECT
    Carrier AS carrier,
    round(avg(CarrierDelay), 1) AS carrier_delay,
    round(avg(WeatherDelay), 1) AS weather_delay,
    round(avg(NASDelay), 1) AS nas_delay,
    round(avg(LateAircraftDelay), 1) AS late_aircraft_delay
FROM ontime.fact_ontime
WHERE Year = 2023 AND ArrDel15 = 1
GROUP BY carrier
ORDER BY carrier_delay DESC
LIMIT 12
queries.description: Mean minutes of each delay cause (carrier, weather, NAS, late aircraft) for delayed flights, per carrier. Four measures plotted at once ("All measures") as grouped columns.

queries.name: Daily flights since 2022
queries.sql:
SELECT FlightDate AS date, count() AS flights
FROM ontime.fact_ontime
WHERE FlightDate >= '2022-01-01'
GROUP BY date
ORDER BY date
queries.description: Every day from 2022 onward (~1,460 points). The chart plots the first 500 and shows a "first 500 of N rows" note — the table view still has them all.

queries.name: Flights by day of week — 2023
queries.sql:
SELECT DayOfWeek AS dayofweek, count() AS flights
FROM ontime.fact_ontime
WHERE Year = 2023
GROUP BY dayofweek
ORDER BY dayofweek
queries.description: Volume by day of week (1 = Monday … 7 = Sunday). "dayofweek" is recognised as an ordinal axis → Column chart.

queries.name: Worst average departure delay by airport — 2023
queries.sql:
SELECT
    a.DisplayAirportName AS airport,
    round(avg(f.DepDelayMinutes), 1) AS avg_dep_delay
FROM ontime.fact_ontime AS f
INNER JOIN ontime.dim_airports AS a
    ON a.AirportCode = f.OriginCode AND a.IsLatest = 1
WHERE f.Year = 2023
GROUP BY airport
HAVING count() >= 10000
ORDER BY avg_dep_delay DESC
LIMIT 15
queries.description: Airports with the highest mean departure delay (minutes) among those with ≥ 10,000 departures in 2023. Horizontal Bar of a non-count measure, joined for names.
